recentProjects.title: Pocketful - Financial Calculators
recentProjects.description: A collection of interactive financial calculators designed to simplify complex calculations, built for accuracy and ease of use.

recentProjects.title: Pocketful - Algo API Website
recentProjects.description: Developed and integrated the Algo Trading API, enabling automated trading workflows with secure endpoints, data handling, and smooth UI for API interaction.

recentProjects.title: Pocketful - Gold & Silver Rates
recentProjects.description: Developed a platform to display live gold and silver prices across states, featuring interactive charts and state-wise price tracking.

recentProjects.title: Pocketful - Landing Page
recentProjects.description: Designed and developed the main landing page for Pocketful, focusing on clear messaging, smooth animations, and responsive design.

recentProjects.title: Pocketful - Authorized Person
recentProjects.description: A straightforward platform for users to register and become authorized sub brokers with Pocketful, featuring smooth animations and easy navigation.

recentProjects.title: MiniArcade - Offline Games Chrome Extension
recentProjects.description: Built a Chrome extension offering a collection of offline games, designed for seamless play without internet connectivity.

recentProjects.title: Apple Watch Studio Clone
recentProjects.description: A pixel-perfect clone of the Apple Watch Studio website, built with Next.js focusing on responsiveness and smooth user interactions.

recentProjects.title: Joybox - MailBox Project
recentProjects.description: Developed a responsive mailbox app with React, Redux for state management, and Firebase for real-time data and authentication.

recentProjects.title: XpenseAi - Expense Tracker Project
recentProjects.description: Built a responsive expense tracker with React, Redux for state management, and Firebase for secure authentication and real-time data storage.
